headline_event: CEASEFIRE CONFIRMED · Hormuz reopening · Islamabad talks Friday
session_headline: CEASEFIRE CONFIRMED — Less than two hours before the 8PM ET deadline, Trump announced a twoweek ceasefire. Iran's Foreign Minister confirmed: safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be possible via coordination with Iranian Armed Forces. Oil reacted instantly — Brent –14% to ~$94, WTI –16% to ~$95. S&P 500 futures +2.5–2.8%. Dow futures +1,200–1,300 pts. Nasdaq futures +3.0–3.2%. Asia: Nikkei +5%, Kospi +5.8%, briefly halted. 10Y yield –10bps to 4.24%. Dollar weakened. Gold +2.5% to $4,820. Islamabad talks Friday — VP Vance expected to lead US delegation. Score transitioning to ~0.72 — DEFENSIVE territory. Queue entering WATCH state. Five weeks of CRASH discipline is about to be rewarded.
macro_drivers:
Score drivers collapsing: Ceasefire confirmed — removes war premium structurally · Hormuz reopening begins (1,000 ships backlogged, 10–15/day clearing) · Brent –14% to ~$94 · WTI –16% to ~$95 · 10Y yield –10bps to 4.24% · VIX falling toward 20–22 · Asia uniformly +4–6%.

Score still in DEFENSIVE, not NEUTRAL: Ceasefire is 2 weeks only · Hormuz coordination via Iranian military (not unconditionally open) · Israel continuing Lebanon operations · Terms disputed · Islamabad Friday is the next major threshold.

Path to queue activation: 3 ARES cycles confirming score ≤0.65 → NEUTRAL → queue fires automatically. GOOGL 3.5%, GEV 60% tranche, CEG full, VST full, VRT size-up execute simultaneously.

alerts.title: CEASEFIRE CONFIRMED · FIVE WEEKS OF DISCIPLINE VALIDATED · THE QUEUE IS ABOUT TO FIRE
alerts.body: This is what the architecture was built for. Five weeks in CRASH. Three false dawns. Two regime whipsaws. The portfolio held its configuration through every one of them without premature deployment. The PTRH provided structural insurance throughout. The defensive sleeve performed. Cash was preserved. Now, with the ceasefire confirmed and score dropping from 0.85 to approximately 0.72, the queue is entering a watch state. Score needs to reach 0.65 and hold for three ARES cycles. Islamabad talks Friday are the most likely catalyst. If a permanent deal framework emerges Friday, the score could reach NEUTRAL by end of next week. GOOGL, GEV, CEG, VST, VRT execute simultaneously on confirmation. This is the moment the system was designed for.

alerts.title: DBMF — OIL REVERSAL — MONITOR FOR MANAGED FUTURES POSITION UNWIND
alerts.body: DBMF holds managed futures positions that were long the oil trend through the war. Brent fell 14% overnight — one of the largest single-session moves in years. A sharp trend reversal of this magnitude will trigger momentum signal reversals inside DBMF's underlying strategy. This does not necessarily mean DBMF falls — managed futures can benefit from the speed of a reversal — but it needs to be monitored this session. Under live DSHP, any appreciation threshold and reversal signal interaction would be surfaced automatically. Under current manual protocol: flag DBMF for intraday review. This is the one position in the defensive sleeve that carries directional risk in a ceasefire environment.

alerts.title: PTRH — POSITION VALIDATED · FIVE WEEKS OF PREMIUM JUSTIFIED · TRANSITION TO 1.5×
alerts.body: The PTRH at 5–8% OTM with 60–90 day DTE provided exactly the convexity it was designed to provide during the worst oil shock since 1990 and a 12–15% QQQ drawdown from ATH. The canonical spec — corrected from ATM to 5–8% OTM in March — held through the deepest CRASH reading of the war. CAM will now transition to 1.5× as DEFENSIVE is confirmed. The puts that are at or near intrinsic value either generate profit or expire with time remaining that can be rolled. Confirm DTE ≥ 30 on all existing contracts before close.

alerts.title: CEASEFIRE IS CONDITIONAL AND TEMPORARY · SCORE DOES NOT CLEAR TO NEUTRAL AUTOMATICALLY
alerts.body: Two weeks. Hormuz via Iranian military coordination — not unconditionally open. 1,000 ships backlogged at a pace of 10–15 per day clears 150–210 ships maximum in the window. Full normalization takes months even with a permanent deal. Israel continuing Lebanon operations outside the ceasefire. The permanent deal framework is the prize — and it is not yet signed. ARES will not confirm NEUTRAL until the score reflects structural resolution, not a temporary pause. The queue fires when the data confirms it. Not before.

alerts.title: AVGO + MRVL — DUAL THESIS EVENTS + CEASEFIRE MACRO LIFT · STRONGEST TWO POSITIONS IN BOOK TODAY
alerts.body: AVGO carries three simultaneous positive signals — Google custom AI chip deal, Anthropic 3.5GW compute deal, and the macro relief from the ceasefire removing the war overhang. MRVL carries two — the NVDA $2B investment and the AVGO custom silicon thesis validation. Both up 3–5% pre-market on top of the broad market relief. Log both as THESIS+ with TIS at maximum INTACT. These two positions are performing exactly as the conviction-squared weighting model predicted they would when the macro environment cleared.

decisions.title: ARES watch — queue could fire this week.
decisions.body: Score ~0.72. DEFENSIVE confirmation in progress. If Islamabad talks Friday produce a permanent deal framework: score could reach 0.65 by end of week. ARES executes the queue automatically. PM reads EOD Snapshot. No manual action required or permitted.

decisions.title: DBMF — intraday monitor.
decisions.body: Oil –14%. Managed futures trend reversal risk. Flag for intraday review. If DBMF drops materially today on oil reversal signal, document as DSHP note. No action until threshold confirmed.

decisions.title: PTRH DTE check.
decisions.body: CAM transitions to 1.5×. Verify all QQQ put contracts have DTE ≥ 30. Any contracts at or below 30 DTE need a roll execution. LAEP NORMAL parameters apply to executions today.

decisions.title: Log AVGO and MRVL thesis events.
decisions.body: Both carry THESIS+ status. TIS at maximum INTACT. Document in session log before close. CDM architecture will automate this function once Josh builds it.

decisions.title: Watch Islamabad Friday.
decisions.body: VP Vance leading US delegation. A signed permanent deal framework drops the score toward 0.60–0.65. NEUTRAL confirmation possible by end of next week. The queue is loaded and ready.
